summary: Comprehensive Settings page testing for FaceConnect PWA. Backend: 10/10 API tests pass (100%). Frontend: All settings sections verified working - User Profile Header, Settings & Privacy (6 items), Tools & Resources (3 items), Preferences (10 items), Appearance theme toggle, AI Features, App Permissions, About & Support, and Logout with confirmation dialog.

issues: Labels display camelCase keys (currentPassword, newPassword, confirmPassword, changePassword) instead of formatted text - i18n translation keys showing when translation not found
Button label shows 'saveChanges' instead of 'Save Changes' - same i18n issue

passed_tests: Backend: Login with valid credentials returns token and user
Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
Backend: Get current user returns user data
Backend: Change password with wrong current password returns 400
Backend: Change password successfully and revert works
Backend: Change password without token returns 401
Backend: Update display name works
Backend: Update phone number works
Backend: Update profile without token returns 401
Backend: Logout invalidates token
UI: Settings page loads with user profile header (avatar, username, email, Edit button)
UI: Settings & Privacy section contains all 6 items (Password, Security, Personal Details, Connected Features, Verification, Ad Preferences)
UI: Tools & Resources section contains all 3 items (Privacy Controls, Family Center, Default Audience)

UI: Preferences section contains all 10 items (Content Preferences, Relationship Preferences, Notifications, Accessibility, Tab Bar, Language & Region, Media, Time Management, Browser, Sharing Suggestions)
UI: Appearance section has Dark/Light theme toggle that works
UI: AI Features section has AI Assistant link
UI: App Permissions section has Manage Permissions
UI: About & Support section has Help Center, Terms & Privacy Policy, About with version
UI: Log Out button shows confirmation dialog with Cancel and Log Out options
UI: Password section has fields for current password, new password, confirm password
UI: Personal Details section allows editing display name and phone
action_items: Minor: Add missing i18n translations for Password section labels (currentPassword -> 'Current Password', etc.)
Minor: Add missing i18n translation for saveChanges button text
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed missing verify_password function in server.py that was causing 500 errors on password change
Fixed change-password endpoint to fetch user with password_hash included (was being excluded by get_user_by_id)
Removed dead code (unreachable return statement) in update-profile endpoint
All settings sections properly implemented with nested navigation pattern
Theme toggle works with data-testid attributes for testing
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Added verify_password function, fixed change-password endpoint, removed dead code
/app/backend/tests/test_settings_endpoints.py - Created comprehensive test suite for settings-related endpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page fully tested and working. Contains 4 main sections: 1) Settings & Privacy (6 items: Password, Security, Personal Details, Connected Features, Verification, Ad Preferences) 2) Tools & Resources (3 items: Privacy Controls, Family Center, Default Audience) 3) Preferences (10 items) 4) Additional sections (Appearance theme toggle, AI Features, App Permissions, About & Support, Logout). Password change API uses POST /api/auth/change-password, Profile update uses PUT /api/auth/update-profile. Some settings items show 'coming soon' toast (Help Center, Terms page, some Connected Features). Minor i18n issue with camelCase labels in Password section.

logout: Confirmation dialog with Cancel and Log Out buttons

mocked_features: Terms & Privacy Policy - shows 'coming soon' toast
Some Connected Features integrations (Google shows connected mock, others show connect buttons)
